groups.name: The Sopranos Universe
groups.explanation: Satriale's Pork Store (location), James Gandolfini (actor who played Tony Soprano), Pine Barrens (iconic episode/location), and 'We're gonna win this thing' (Tony Soprano quote) are all from The Sopranos.

groups.name: Fictional Companies from TV Shows
groups.explanation: Dunder Mifflin (The Office), Waystar Royco (Succession), Bluth's Original Frozen Banana (Arrested Development), and Veridian Dynamics (Better Off Ted) are all fictional companies central to different TV comedies/dramas — never from the same show.

groups.name: TRAP — Female TV Spies (Different Shows)
groups.explanation: These are all iconic female spy protagonists from different shows — Carrie Mathison (Homeland), Sydney Bristow (Alias), Annie Walker (Covert Affairs), and Elizabeth Jennings (The Americans). They look like they could be from the same show or network, but each is the lead of a completely separate series. The trap is assuming they share another connection — they share only their profession and gender, across four distinct shows.

groups.name: Shows Created by Greg Garcia
groups.explanation: Malcolm in the Middle, My Name Is Earl, Raising Hope, and Reaper were all created or co-created by Greg Garcia. This is a deeply obscure showrunner connection spanning Fox, NBC, and The CW across different eras of TV comedy.
